figures.caption: Figure 2: Visualization of (a) 3D segmentation on a curved MPR (b) 3D segmentation mask, color-coded with the VWT (c) Pathlines computed from 4D-Flow MRI, color-coded with the velocity

Figure 1: Tab for manual segmentation of the carotid artery in cross-sections that are perpendicular to the centerline. Automatic segmentations can be created and are transformed into contours. This allows for manual correction and good visibility of the BB-MRI data.
